# arubasdwan_app_compound_classifications (Data Source)

Fetches user-defined compound classification application definitions from the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator via GET /gms/rest/applicationDefinition?base=compoundClassification&resourceKey=userDefined.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_app_compound_classifications" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `compound_classifications` (Attributes List) List of compound classification application definitions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--compound_classifications))

<a id="nestedatt--compound_classifications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `compound_classifications`

Read-Only:

- `confidence` (Number) The confidence level (0-100).
- `description` (String) The description of the application.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the classification is disabled.
- `dscp` (String) DSCP match.
- `dst_dns` (String) Destination DNS match.
- `dst_geo` (String) Destination geolocation match.
- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP match.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port match.
- `dst_service` (String) Destination service match.
- `either_dns` (String) Either direction DNS match.
- `either_geo` (String) Either direction geolocation match.
- `either_ip` (String) Either direction IP match.
- `either_port` (String) Either direction port match.
- `either_service` (String) Either direction service match.
- `id` (String) The numeric ID assigned by the Orchestrator (as a string).
- `name` (String) The name of the application.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol match (e.g. "tcp", "udp").
- `src_dns` (String) Source DNS match.
- `src_geo` (String) Source geolocation match.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP match.
- `src_port` (String) Source port match.
- `src_service` (String) Source service match.
- `vlan` (String) VLAN match.
